entry.title: Bill 74 (Hawaiʻi County): Passed Second Reading → —
entry.content:
AUTHORIZES THE ISSUANCE OF A GENERAL OBLIGATION BOND OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I IN A PRINCIPAL AMOUNT NOT TO EXCEED TWO HUNDRED SEVENTY-FIVE THOUSAND DOLLARS FOR THE PURPOSE OF FINANCING A PORTION OF THE COSTS OF CONSTRUCTING A PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM SERVING IKI PLACE, KOHANAIKI HOMESTEADS, NORTH KONA, HAWAI‘I; FIXES THE FORM, DENOMINATION, AND CERTAIN DETAILS OF SUCH BOND; PROVIDES FOR THE ISSUANCE AN

The sale of $275,000 of a general obligation bond to the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) is required for the County to secure a loan in the same amount from the USDA.

Status: Passed Second Reading → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-08-20

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 74 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AUTHORIZES THE ISSUANCE OF A GENERAL OBLIGATION BOND OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I IN A PRINCIPAL AMOUNT NOT TO EXCEED TWO HUNDRED SEVENTY-FIVE THOUSAND DOLLARS FOR THE PURPOSE OF FINANCING A PORTION OF THE COSTS OF CONSTRUCTING A PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM SERVING IKI PLACE, KOHANAIKI HOMESTEADS, NORTH KONA, HAWAI‘I; FIXES THE FORM, DENOMINATION, AND CERTAIN DETAILS OF SUCH BOND; PROVIDES FOR THE ISSUANCE AN

The sale of $275,000 of a general obligation bond to the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) is required for the County to secure a loan in the same amount from the USDA.

Latest action: Council: Bill 74 passes second & final reading - 8/20/25

View on the council site
